items.name: claude-code
items.description: Claude Code Snapshot for Research. All original source code is the property of Anthropic.

items.name: claude-code
items.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

items.name: reclip
items.description: Download videos from almost any website. Lightweight, self-hosted media downloader with a clean web UI.

items.name: packet-tracer-network-project
items.description: Basic network configuration using Cisco Packet Tracer including router and switch setup, IP addressing, and connectivity testing between devices.

items.name: quantum-noise-signal-classifier
items.description: Quantum Machine Learning project with noise filtering and signal classification

items.name: see-through
items.description: "Single-image Layer Decomposition for Anime Characters" (SIGGRAPH 2026, Conditionally Accepted)

items.name: Network-project-packet-tracer-
items.description: Simulation of a basic network in Cisco Packet Tracer with router and switch configuration, IP addressing, and successful communication using ping.

items.name: Emergency-Power-Cut-Detection-with-Automatic-Nearest-Floor-Rescue
items.description: A reliable elevator safety solution that identifies sudden power failures and triggers an automatic nearest-floor landing. Designed to prevent passengers from being trapped, ensuring quick and safe evacuation during unexpected outages.

items.name: Emergency-Power-Cut-Detection-with-Automatic-Nearest-Floor-Rescue
items.description: An automated emergency response system for elevators that detects power interruptions and safely directs the lift to the nearest floor. Focuses on improving safety, reducing risk, and providing a seamless rescue process without manual intervention.

items.name: Emergency-Power-Cut-Detection-with-Automatic-Nearest-Floor-Rescue
items.description: An intelligent system for detecting power cuts in elevators and ensuring automatic nearest-floor rescue. Uses sensors and control logic to safely bring passengers to the closest floor during emergencies.

items.name: Emergency-Power-Cut-Detection-with-Automatic-Nearest-Floor-Rescue
items.description: A smart elevator safety system that detects emergency power failures and automatically moves the lift to the nearest floor for safe evacuation. Enhances passenger safety using real-time monitoring and automated rescue mechanisms.

items.name: review-rating-predictor
items.description: Machine Learning project that predicts product review ratings using TF-IDF and Naive Bayes with a Streamlit web app interface.

items.name: awesome-researchclaw
items.description: 🦞 A curated list of ResearchClaw ecosystem projects, AI research agents, autonomous paper-writing tools, and scientific workflow resources.

items.name: fastvideosegmenter
items.description: ⚡ Fast desktop tool to split videos into segments using ffmpeg stream copy — parallel processing, dark mode, no re-encoding
